name: Picante Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and let simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. Chop tomatoes while cooking.
5. The number of peppers can be adjusted to increase the level of spiciness or "heat".
6. Serve chilled with Doritos or similar tortilla chips.
7. Enjoy!
